The Vandarachnis genus contains several hybrid orchid species, each with unique characteristics. These hybrid species are often bred for their striking colors and fragrances. × Vandarachnis orchids are primarily found in cultivation and are highly prized by orchid enthusiasts for their beauty and rarity.
